heading: Start a Stream Processor
body:
The Atlas Administration API provides the
[Start One Stream Processor](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-startgroupstreamprocessor) and
[Start One Stream Processor with Options](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-startgroupstreamprocessorwith) endpoints for
starting a stream processor.

- To start a stream processor without options, use [Start
  One Stream Processor](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-startgroupstreamprocessor)

- To start a stream processor and modify properties of the
  [$source](pipe.$source) stage, use
  [Start One Stream Processor with Options](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-startgroupstreamprocessorwith) This endpoint
  supports modifying either the `startAfter` or
  `startAtOperationTime` properties.
